context.goal: Insert a dropdown form field next to the second numbered item.
context.cues: Forms ribbon is active; a checkbox field is already placed after item '1.' and the cursor is positioned on item '2.'.

state_anchor.locator: page area showing item '1.' with a checkbox and item '2.' with the text cursor

anchors.locator: insertion point immediately after numbered item '2.' on the page

procedure.expect: Dropdown field insertion is invoked from the Forms ribbon.
A dropdown form field labeled 'Choose an item' appears next to item '2.' below the first checkbox.
